HMT products fall under capital goods category where product life goes beyond 25 years in majority of cases. The market requirement is for extension of the life of products or systems through process of refurbishments. After end of desired life of capital goods, they become unfit for reuse and hence being disposed as scrap by owner of the capital good products.
